name: Indigo Porcelain
description: Deep-indigo ink on porcelain white — the indigo IS the ink, not just an accent. Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans body. Academic, scholarly, like a Chinese journal of contemporary thought.
descriptionZh: 深靛蓝当墨（靛蓝就是字色本身，而非 accent）+ 瓷白纸。Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans。学术、有深度，像蓝印花瓷器或一本当代思想期刊。
bestFor: 学术 / 研究 / 论文解读
AI / 数据 / 工程深度
技术发布会 / 严肃汇报
思想型 / 评论型长文改编
